name: git-github
description: Everyday git/GitHub operations for Claude Code: draft commits and PRs that match the repo's style, run a single-tool authoritative code review via the bundled read-only code-reviewer agent (also consumed by planning's executing-plans for per-task and per-stage review), audit a repo or diff for faked verification — stubbed gate tasks, tests that never ran, fabricated evidence, hidden exclusions — via gate-audit (the after-the-fact enforcement of planning's honest-gates rules), dispatch the same diff to sibling CLIs (codex/gemini/opencode) for multi-model second opinions, audit code comments for explanatory value, audit GitHub Actions workflows for errors and outdated actions, review and tighten READMEs, audit dependency licenses and pick a project LICENSE, and cut release tags. The GitHub Actions workflow lane also emits findings on plugin-dev's shared deterministic contract via scripts/validate.sh. Skills auto-trigger on natural language; nothing autoposts, force-pushes, or rewrites history.
